overall.description: A first-person elevator ascent through a futuristic cyberpunk city at night, featuring dense neon signage and holographic advertisements. The camera rises from an enclosed shaft past a massive red neon lips sign, opening to a panoramic view of highways and skyscrapers before arriving at an upper floor interior. This is gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 with high-fidelity ray-traced lighting and atmospheric haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed elevator shaft with holographic advertisements

agents.ego_description: rising steadily in an elevator through a narrow shaft lined with metal girders and glowing advertisements

entered.detail: illuminated rectangular sign with 'NOXCHES' text mounted on the shaft wall
large vertical holographic advertisement displaying a burrito with 'BURRITO' text
orange neon sign reading 'ALL FOODS' below the burrito advertisement
large LED screen displaying colorful abstract patterns and advertisements
industrial metal walls with cross-bracing and riveted panels

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a steady vertical ascent through a narrow, enclosed elevator shaft. Metal walls and structural girders surround the camera while holographic advertisements for food products and the 'NOXCHES' sign glide past. The lighting is artificial and neon-dominated, with no natural light or sky visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevator shaft opening to exterior city view

events.description: elevator emerges from enclosed shaft into open air with cityscape becoming visible
lighting shifts from artificial neon to mixed ambient city glow and neon signage

agents.ego_description: continuing upward while passing a massive red neon sign and revealing the cityscape below

entered.detail: massive glowing red neon sign shaped like lips mounted on building exterior
multi-lane highway with moving vehicle lights visible below
distant industrial chimneys emitting smoke on the horizon
tall cylindrical structure wrapped with circular digital advertisements

segments.scene_description: The elevator breaks out of the enclosed shaft, revealing a breathtaking transition to the open air. A massive red neon lips sign dominates the left side as the camera ascends past it. Below, the city highway with streaming vehicle lights and distant industrial smokestacks become visible against the night sky, while the enclosed shaft elements fall away behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated panoramic view of cyberpunk cityscape

events.description: holographic whale advertisement swims into view on the left side of the frame

agents.ego_description: rising high above the city streets with an expansive view of the urban sprawl and highway interchanges

entered.detail: complex multi-level highway junction with streaming traffic lights
large blue glowing holographic whale swimming through the air between buildings
tall futuristic towers with illuminated windows forming the city skyline

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends through wide open air with a panoramic view of the sprawling cyberpunk metropolis. Below, the highway interchange glows with streams of vehicle lights, while a massive holographic whale swims through the air on the left. The industrial district and circular billboard tower recede into the distance as the city skyline expands in all directions.

events.description: elevator arrives at destination floor and enters interior building space

agents.ego_description: slowing ascent and arriving at an upper floor interior, transitioning from exterior city view to indoor corridor

entered.detail: tall building facade with prominent vertical red neon light strips
large advertisement showing a hand holding a glass with Japanese text
red poster with text 'YOUR NEIGHBOR ALREADY CALLED' and image of a couple
dark painted walls and metal railings of the arrival corridor

segments.scene_description: The elevator approaches its destination, passing close to a skyscraper with vertical red neon lights and a large holographic hand advertisement. The camera transitions from the open city view into an enclosed interior space, arriving at a corridor with a 'YOUR NEIGHBOR ALREADY CALLED' poster on the wall, marking the end of the ascent.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous vertical ascent that transforms from a claustrophobic industrial shaft into a sprawling neon metropolis before concluding inside a sterile corridor. It begins within a narrow elevator shaft, gliding past metal girders and holographic food advertisements under artificial neon lighting. As the camera breaks out of the enclosure, the scene opens into the night air, passing a massive red neon lips sign that reveals a panoramic view of streaming highway lights and distant industrial smokestacks below. The perspective then expands across the wide-open cityscape, where a holographic whale swims through the air and a circular billboard tower recedes into the distance. Finally, the camera brushes past a skyscraper featuring a holographic hand and vertical red lights before transitioning from the open sky into an enclosed interior hallway marked by a wall poster.
